seoTitle: Elrundie vs Elsey — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Elrundie and Elsey. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Elrundie and Elsey.
heading: Elrundie vs Elsey — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Elrundie, Northern Territory and Elsey, Northern Territory. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Elsey has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Elrundie (32/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Elrundie or Elsey safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Elrundie has a flood risk score of 60/100, while Elsey scores 39/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Elrundie scores 42/100 for bushfire risk. Elsey scores 28/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Elrundie or Elsey?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Elsey has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.25% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
